Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Plaintiff Adrianna Santiago To Answer Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request To Identify And Produce Tangible Things For Inspection And Copying; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Truman Phan-Quang With Exhibits In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jan-20-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MARIAN'S MERCHANDISING CORP.'s Motion For An Order Compelling Plaintiff Adrianna Santiago To Answer Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request To Identify And Produce Tangible Things For Inspection And Copying:

The Motion is granted. Plaintiff shall, within 10 days, serve code compliant responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories,and Request To Identify And Produce Tangible Things For Inspection And Copying.

The court will review proposed order submitted by prevailing party.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
